proposals.anchor: return restTemplate.postForObject(baseUrl + "/charge", new Charge(orderId, amountCents), Receipt.class);
proposals.rationale: The payments charge path is a synchronous remote call guarded by a circuit breaker, but no timeout setting is present in the call site or service config.
The notifications dependency is called synchronously with no circuit breaker, timeout, retry, fallback, or other resilience wrapper visible at the call site or in config.
A ledger write failure is caught and only logged, so the caller is not told that the durable record was not written.
The scheduled reconciliation job is present in code, but there is no companion job/runbook metadata in the service config or manifest.
